title: Radiator Brass Plated Metal Keys with Valve (2 Pack) 5 mm x 5 mm - Durable & Elegant Gold Design, Suitable for Most Wall Mounted Radiators
features: UNIVERSAL FIT: Each pack includes two brass-plated Radiator Keys, designed with a standard 5mm x 5mm valve size to accommodate most wall-mounted radiators.

HIGH-QUALITY MTERIAL: Crafted from durable metal materials, these radiator keys are built to last. They can withstand regular use without wearing out or breaking easily. This ensures that you have a reliable solution for maintaining your radiators.

EASY TO USE: The practical design of these keys makes them easy to handle and use. The size and shape allow for a comfortable grip, making it effortless to bleed your radiators and regulate heat efficiency.

PRACTICAL SOLUTION: A must-have accessory for effortless radiator bleeding, ensuring efficient performance and heat distribution in your home. Keep one key as a spare or use in multiple locations for convenience.

ELEGANT FINISH: The stunning gold finish of these radiator keys adds a touch of elegance to your radiator setup. Not only do they serve as functional tools, but they also add a stylish element to your home decor.
description: Product Description DESCRIPTION: Premium quality radiator keys contains two brass plated keys that have a valve size of 5mm x 5mm. Safety Warning No warning applicable
